manualReviewRules: If a source returns 401, 403, 429, or uses a login gate, mark the affected tool as manual-review required instead of guessing.
If an official PDF, budget page, or fee table changes hash, inspect the changed document before editing public calculations.
If a government site is down but the tool still has cached data, keep the tool live and add a visible source-review note only when the outage persists across two checks.
Never replace an official source with a blog, agent, travel agency, or SEO content page unless it is clearly marked as secondary context.
